Home.title: Experienced Frontend Developer & UI/UX Strategist
Home.subtitle: Building high-quality, performant, and accessible web interfaces using modern frontend technologies and best practices.
Home.heroAvailabilityDetail: Open for freelance projects, product collaborations, and full-time frontend opportunities.
Home.aboutDescription: I'm a highly driven frontend developer with a strong appreciation for design thinking and user-centric development. I specialize in building visually appealing, responsive, and intuitive user interfaces that deliver real value. With a solid understanding of modern JavaScript frameworks and a deep interest in user experience, I create web applications that are both functional and delightful to use.
Home.aboutCardDescription: I focus on clean code, reusable systems, and polished user journeys that scale.
Home.locationDescription: Open to remote and hybrid collaboration across global teams.
Home.emailDescription: Best channel for project inquiries and collaboration opportunities.
Home.experienceIntro: My journey has centered on frontend architecture, interface quality, and reliable delivery.
Home.experience1Description: Spearheading frontend architecture for complex web platforms, collaborating closely with designers and backend teams to deliver scalable, maintainable codebases. Actively mentoring junior developers and contributing to internal design systems and component libraries.
Home.experience2Description: Developed and maintained high-performance web applications using React and Next.js, emphasizing accessibility, responsiveness, and cross-browser compatibility. Led several UI revamp projects that significantly improved user engagement and retention.
Home.experience3Description: Contributed to building and maintaining responsive websites for clients across various industries. Translated design mockups into clean, semantic HTML/CSS and optimized frontend performance for faster page loads.
Home.skillsIntro: A practical stack for modern, scalable, and user-focused digital products.
Home.skillsCardFrontendDescription: Crafting interactive interfaces that stay fast and consistent.
Home.skillsCardBackendDescription: Integrating APIs and backend flows for stable data-driven experiences.
Home.skillsCardToolsDescription: Using modern tooling for efficient team workflows and maintainability.
Home.skillsCardSoftDescription: Strong communication and problem-solving to keep delivery on track.
Home.projectsIntro: Selected case studies that show process, execution quality, and measurable outcomes.
Home.project1Description: A full-stack, responsive e-commerce solution featuring real-time product inventory, payment gateway integration, and a custom admin dashboard for product and order management.
Home.project2Description: A task management web app designed for teams, enabling real-time collaboration, role-based access control, and seamless integration with third-party productivity tools.
Home.project3Description: A modern, animated portfolio built with SvelteKit and Tailwind CSS to showcase my professional background, skills, projects, and achievements in a dynamic and engaging format.
Home.contactIntro: Need a frontend partner for your next product? Let's discuss your goals and timeline.

Home.certificate1Description: Awarded for completing a comprehensive, project-based program covering advanced topics in frontend engineering, including performance optimization, accessibility, and modern UI architecture.

home.description: I craft responsive, user-focused, and maintainable web applications using the latest in frontend development tools and practices.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I’m a frontend engineer dedicated to delivering accessible and aesthetic digital experiences using modern frameworks and thoughtful design.
